questions.question: Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 122, 36, 64, 49
questions.explanation: 36, 49, and 64 are perfect squares. 122 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question: What is the average of the following 5 consecutive even numbers: 30, 32, 34, 36, 38?
questions.trick: For a consecutive arithmetic sequence, the average is simply the exact middle term.

questions.question: Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
Which is the longest river in the world?
If MAT is coded as PDW, how will PEN be coded in that same language?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by exactly 3 positions in the English alphabet.
questions.trick: Note the position gap between the first letter of the word and the first letter of its code.

questions.question: A can complete a piece of work in 40 days while B can complete the same work in 56 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 40 * 56 = 2240. Rate = 40 + 56 = 96. Time = Work / Rate = 23.33 days.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 3, 9, 27, 81, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows a Geometric Progression with a constant multiplier ratio of 3. So, 81 * 3 = 243.
questions.trick: If numbers scale up very quickly, look for multiplication rather than addition.

questions.question: Who wrote the national anthem of India?
Find the next number in the series: 3, 15, 27, 39, 51, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 12. So, 51 + (12) = 63.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: If an article is bought for Rs. 940 and sold at a profit of 15%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.

questions.question: A train travels at an average speed of 101 km/hr. How much distance will it cover in 6 hours?
questions.trick: Basic multiplication rule: D = S * T.

questions.question: Who was the first President of India?
